citations.desc: Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries.
citations.narrative:
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 12:15 pm on May
21, 2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by knocking on door, honking car horn, and calling the phone
numbers on file. Spoke to a facility representative who was not available for an inspection. Failure to provide access to
the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide
access is serious and may result in enforcement action.
End Section

narrative:
2.126(b) 
   
Access and inspection of records and property; submission of itineraries. 
A responsible adult was not available to accompany APHIS Officials during the inspection process at 12:15 pm on May 
21, 2026. The inspector attempted to contact the licensee by knocking on door, honking car horn, and calling the phone 
numbers on file. Spoke to a facility representative who was not available for an inspection. Failure to provide access to 
the facility, animals, and records for inspection is a violation of the AWA and regulations. Continued failure to provide 
access is serious and may result in enforcement action. 
 
 
End Section
